name: 春季

representativeFoods.name: 腌笃鲜
representativeFoods.description: 春笋、咸肉、鲜肉慢炖，鲜掉眉毛

representativeFoods.name: 荠菜馄饨
representativeFoods.description: 野生荠菜配猪肉，清香扑鼻

representativeFoods.name: 香椿炒蛋
representativeFoods.description: 香椿嫩芽与鸡蛋同炒，独特香气

healthTip: 养肝为先，多吃绿色蔬菜

name: 夏季

representativeFoods.name: 冬瓜盅
representativeFoods.description: 冬瓜为盅，内藏虾仁、干贝，清热解暑

representativeFoods.name: 凉拌苦瓜
representativeFoods.description: 苦瓜焯水凉拌，清火降燥

representativeFoods.name: 荷叶粉蒸肉
representativeFoods.description: 五花肉裹米粉，荷叶包裹蒸制，不腻清香

healthTip: 养心健脾，宜清淡少油腻

name: 秋季

representativeFoods.name: 清蒸大闸蟹
representativeFoods.description: 阳澄湖大闸蟹，蟹黄肥美

representativeFoods.name: 桂花糯米藕
representativeFoods.description: 藕孔塞糯米，桂花糖水熬煮，甜糯

representativeFoods.name: 板栗烧鸡
representativeFoods.description: 板栗粉糯，鸡肉鲜嫩，秋冬滋补

healthTip: 润肺防燥，多食梨、藕、百合

representativeFoods.name: 腊味合蒸
representativeFoods.description: 腊肉、腊肠、腊鱼同蒸，咸香下饭
